name: israeli-price-worker
description: Israeli supermarket price sync worker — runs on Israeli VPS

scripts.test:firebase: node -e "import('./config.js').then(m=>m.loadConfig()).then(async c=>{const {initFirebase,getDB}=await import('./firebaseWriter.js');initFirebase(c.firebase);const db=getDB();const s=await db.ref('syncSummary').get();console.log('Firebase OK, syncSummary:', s.val());process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error('FAILED:',e.message);process.exit(1)})"
scripts.test:curl: bash -c "echo Testing Shufersal... && curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"HTTP %{http_code} from %{url_effective}\n\" -L --max-time 10 https://prices.shufersal.co.il/ && echo Testing Rami Levy... && curl -s -o /dev/null -w \"HTTP %{http_code} from %{url_effective}\n\" -L --max-time 10 https://url.retail.pe.il/MF/latest/ && echo Done."
